description: Invention-complete witness manifest — English-scoped by default (LAPLACE_INGEST_LANGS=en)

language_scope.law: Every witness source remains in the manifest. Language filters reduce which languages are ingested from multilingual corpora — not which witnesses exist.

synset_hub_law: WordNet synsets (WordNetSynset offset+pos) and senses (wordnet/sense/{key}) are the shared anchor. OMW attaches to synset IDs. VerbNet attaches to sense IDs. PropBank attaches lemmas→rolesets→VerbNet. FrameNet attaches lemmas→frames. SemLink aligns PropBank↔VerbNet↔FrameNet. ConceptNet/Atomic2020 share the lemma arena but do not use synset IDs.
ordering_law: unicode → iso639 → wordnet → omw → verbnet → propbank → framenet → semlink → tiny-codes → stack → text/image/audio → repos → models → [deferred] conceptnet → atomic2020 → ud → wiktionary
proof_first_law: Proof path (code + annex + repos) runs immediately after the *Net hub so invention claims are testable before multi-hour lexical bulk. Deferred lexical is idempotent and skippable via LAPLACE_SKIP_LEXICAL_BULK=1.

wordnet_cluster.links: anchor: synsets, senses, lemma arena, pointer graph
lemma HAS_SENSE roleset; roleset CORRESPONDS_TO verbnet/class
/c/en/ terms — shared ContentEmitter lemmas, not synset IDs
script relations (XWant, Causes, …) on event atoms

deferred_lexical_bulk.note: High-value usage/examples; not required to prove code/repo/document/image paths.

functionality.law: Code corpora (tiny-codes, stack) and test-data annex (document/image/audio) deposit before repos; repos before safetensor snapshots. test-data/text is ingested via ingest document; db-roundtrip on the same files is proof-only (ingest-text.cmd / e2e-full.cmd).

test_data.roundtrip_proof: scripts/win/ingest-text.cmd or e2e-full.cmd — db-roundtrip sandbox only

authority_sources.law: Official language/platform sources and their documentation are the highest-trust code witnesses: the language's own repository testifies its idioms; its docs are the Rosetta intent↔implementation corpus. Acquire with download-code-data.cmd authority; ingest via the repos loop after local repositories.

clones.witnesses: C + SQL idioms from the database the substrate lives in
C + Python from the language's source of truth
learn.microsoft.com content as markdown — intent↔code pairs
C# + C from the platform's source of truth (largest — ingest last)
